items.headline: Is IREN (IREN) Quietly Rewriting Its AI Infrastructure Story With Microsoft-Backed GPU Financing?
items.summary: In early June 2026, IREN Limited closed a US$3.65 billion investment-grade GPU financing facility linked to its Microsoft AI cloud contract and advanced plans for an 800MW, transmission-ready data center campus in Bundey, South Australia, while also engaging BE Networks and NVIDIA DSX Air to test its upcoming Blackwell Ultra GPU deployment via a digital twin. Taken together, these moves highlight how IREN is trying to reposition itself from a Bitcoin miner into a large-scale AI...
